current_goal: Удержать production publishing contour Миро в serverless-safe бюджете без слабых fallback-публикаций, с проверяемыми источниками и без market/currency dominance в public surface
current_task: Market-dominance hardening от 2026-05-22 плюс post-deploy publish-contract hardening: fallback/rescue блокирует markets_fx/markets_crypto при market-heavy ленте, sports/world sources расширены и очищены, public home/RSS получили diversity ordering, market story-family dedupe, macro-claim support gate, route_attempts trace, Telegram HTML escaping, Telegram pre-send public URL gate, stricter non-market editorial fallback policy и RSS same-story corroboration fix добавлены
active_step: Production deploy proof collected on 2026-05-22: Vercel deploy dpl_3S6LJR4XSsUftTMrks8aUcYsTkJ4 is aliased to https://ai-blogersite.vercel.app; protected real cron topic=world&strategy=urgent_override created visible World post 2793a91e-d59c-411a-8ffa-ea37d082c9d9 from Phys.org and sent Telegram messageId=93. After that proof, hardening commit e14f64a tightened same-story corroboration, non-market editorial fallback, and Telegram pre-send public URL verification; local npm run check passed, GitHub CI run 26283567324 passed, CD workflow_run 26283609148 deployed and smoke-tested production, and live routes /, /archive, /feed.xml, /api/health returned 200 with health status=ok.
next_step: После deploy наблюдать ближайшие GitHub cron runs: market rescue должен быть заблокирован при market-heavy ленте или missing balance, skipped active slots должны быть видимыми, quality_events.quality_flags должен содержать route_attempts.details.attempts, GitHub should fail market_rescue_violation if route violates the contract, Telegram send должен остаться teaser-only with valid link HTML, а новые публикации должны выравнивать World/Tech/Sports
blockers: Локальных blockers для publishing contour нет: npm run typecheck и npm run build проходят после hotfix-а

Полный локальный npm run check после source-hygiene pass от 2026-05-22 проходит: typecheck, source compliance, content eval, public/Telegram contracts, agent/source/public-post/cron/Telegram tests, mobile/typography checks и Next build зеленые

Свежий live npm run audit:sources --silent после этого pass попытался 32 active sources и вернул 32 ok, 0 failed, 0 stale; world rows были Naked Science, N+1, Phys.org, NASA News Releases, ESA Space Science и Onliner People, без Onliner Money

Production deploy proof от 2026-05-22 13:18 +03 собран: final Vercel deploy dpl_3S6LJR4XSsUftTMrks8aUcYsTkJ4 Ready and aliased; real protected world cron created visible post 2793a91e-d59c-411a-8ffa-ea37d082c9d9 and Telegram messageId=93; live health returned status=ok with reader_visibility=pass

Post-deploy degraded health was not solved by weakening the gate: the old hidden market post stayed blocked, while world ranking/localization/focused metadata were hardened until a clean non-market post restored health
Одиночный production smoke уже зеленый, но полный acceptance по cadence еще не закрыт во времени: observation все еще нужен на плановых слотах
OpenRouter free pool на 2026-04-29 остается нестабильным production baseline: live probes дали 429, 400 и length-truncated completions with content=null

Новый writer default для длинных текстов уже смещен к Groq openai/gpt-oss-120b и production env выровнен, но fresh non-preview cron-run после последнего deploy еще не зафиксирован отдельным proof bundle
Старые слабые и source-less posts остаются historical debt в архиве, хотя новый novelty filter уже не использует их как hard-block для source-backed fallback
World, tech_world и sports могут честно уходить в skipped, если source pool не дает tension; после 2026-05-15 это намеренное качество, а не runtime-crash

Market/currency dominance подтвержден live-аудитом 2026-05-22: guard, source diversification, public read-time diversity и stricter GitHub outcome deployed; one real World post proof is collected, but several natural scheduled GitHub runs are still needed for cadence acceptance

Fresh read-only GitHub check on 2026-05-22 showed natural scheduled run 26274884294 still published markets_fx from old main@30c6f4f with Markets=11/20 and markets_share=0.55; this is current production evidence for deploying the local guard

GitHub market_rescue_violation gate is now local code coverage, not production proof: deploy/live Actions observation must confirm the workflow fails if route violates category_balance.markets_rescue_allowed=false
Telegram pre-send public URL gate is deployed in commit e14f64a and covered locally; next live hidden/404 event or controlled ops test must confirm the channel skips ghost links in production

Non-market editorial fallback is deployed stricter in commit e14f64a: localization/mixed-fact repair can publish, but thin article body or detached opinion should stay skipped. Production previews after deploy confirmed weak tech_world, sports and world drafts stayed skipped; natural scheduled observation is still needed

RSS same-story corroboration no longer counts hostname/path boilerplate and is deployed in commit e14f64a; source-ranking after deploy should not treat neighboring feed items as independent confirmation

Cleanup classification is local-only and deploy-clean: artifacts/verification, scripts/query-db-real.ts and scripts/smoke.ts are ignored/excluded because they can contain generated evidence or read .env.local

Sports source pool больше не single-source locally: active runtime includes Sports.ru RSS, NHL Scoreboard API and MLB News RSS; old Sport-Express/Soccer365/TheSportsDB/Pressball were not re-enabled because live probes showed timeout, 403 or stale 2024 feed behavior

World source lane больше не использует Onliner Money RSS locally: active runtime now relies on Naked Science, N+1, Phys.org, NASA News Releases, ESA Space Science, Onliner People and opt-in GDELT, with filters for FIFA/World Cup/tournament and money/currency/banknote/ruble/dollar drift
Public home/RSS diversity ordering is a display-layer mitigation, not historical cleanup: archived market-heavy posts remain in Supabase until an explicit hide/regenerate decision is made
Market story-family dedupe is now local code coverage, not production proof: deploy/live cron observation must confirm that repeated USD/RUB and USD/BYN variants are skipped before persistence

Unsupported market macro-claim gate is now local code coverage, not production proof: deploy/live observation must confirm generated posts no longer add export/import/energy/demand explanations unless observed facts support them

Persisted route_attempts debug trace is now local code coverage, not production proof: deploy/live observation must confirm quality_events.quality_flags carries route_attempts.details.attempts on real cron rows
Telegram HTML quote escaping is now local code coverage, not production proof: deploy/live Telegram send should confirm teaser-only formatting and working link HTML

Live source audit after the HN hardening had no stale sources but did show transient 5s timeouts on 3DNews and HackerNews Algolia; treat this as source reliability noise to monitor, not as permission to weaken the no-politics filter
HackerNews теперь fail-safe под no-politics фильтром и может давать too few usable stories; это безопаснее, чем политический leak в tech_world
Anthropic, Meta AI, Mistral and xAI пока не включены в active runtime because stable official RSS/API was not confirmed in this pass
BBC / bbc.com / bbci.co.uk теперь hard-block для active runtime; расширение источников нужно сверять с docs/COMPLIANCE_SOURCE_POLICY.md и npm run check:source-compliance
